creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
PR 183949 is about the same problem and suggests a patch, see
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=183949 , please. The patch
was tested by both originators and me (9.1-RELEASE-p3, 10.0-BETA3 and
11.0-CURRENT).

The patch from 183949 should be committed, than both PR's can be closed.

Thanks,
Rainer Hurling
